1886180.name: Crimson Tactics: The Rise of The White Banner Artbook
1886180.description:
Have a peek into the journey that led to the creation of the world of Crimson Tactics: The Rise of The White Banner. The collection of artwork includes concepts of environment, people, equipment and other miscellaneous imagery alongside the lore behind them. There is also an illustrated script of the prologue included in the artbook for a short dive into the narrative foundations of the game.
The artbook consists of 140+ pages and is divided into five different sections corresponding to the artwork category.
1886180.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
